sessionStart.bash: HOOK_HELPER="${ILONGRUN_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot-ilongrun}/bin/hook_event.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK_HELPER" ]; then python3 "$HOOK_HELPER"; else exit 0; fi
sessionStart.powershell: $root = if ($env:ILONGRUN_HOME) { $env:ILONGRUN_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot-ilongrun' }; $helper = Join-Path $root 'bin/hook_event.py'; if (Test-Path $helper) { python $helper } else { exit 0 }

sessionEnd.bash: HOOK_HELPER="${ILONGRUN_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot-ilongrun}/bin/hook_event.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK_HELPER" ]; then python3 "$HOOK_HELPER"; else exit 0; fi
sessionEnd.powershell: $root = if ($env:ILONGRUN_HOME) { $env:ILONGRUN_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot-ilongrun' }; $helper = Join-Path $root 'bin/hook_event.py'; if (Test-Path $helper) { python $helper } else { exit 0 }

errorOccurred.bash: HOOK_HELPER="${ILONGRUN_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot-ilongrun}/bin/hook_event.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK_HELPER" ]; then python3 "$HOOK_HELPER"; else exit 0; fi
errorOccurred.powershell: $root = if ($env:ILONGRUN_HOME) { $env:ILONGRUN_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot-ilongrun' }; $helper = Join-Path $root 'bin/hook_event.py'; if (Test-Path $helper) { python $helper } else { exit 0 }

preToolUse.bash: HOOK_HELPER="${ILONGRUN_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot-ilongrun}/bin/hook_event.py"; if [ -f "$HOOK_HELPER" ]; then python3 "$HOOK_HELPER"; else exit 0; fi
preToolUse.powershell: $root = if ($env:ILONGRUN_HOME) { $env:ILONGRUN_HOME } else { Join-Path $HOME '.copilot-ilongrun' }; $helper = Join-Path $root 'bin/hook_event.py'; if (Test-Path $helper) { python $helper } else { exit 0 }
